headings: INSTRUCTIONS FOR INVOICING AND COMPLETION OF THE APPLICATION FOR PAYMENT FORM
text: 6. Arch-Con  reserves  the  right  to  require  Subcontractor's  and  its  subcontractors'/suppliers'  execution  of  a  joint  check agreement when deemed necessary, and/or the right to issue joint checks to Subcontractor and its subcontractors/suppliers. If Subcontractor is deemed to be a 'Joint Check' vendor for purposes of this Subcontract, Subcontractor shall provide a complete  Supplier/2nd  tier  Subcontractor  listing  with  EVERY  application  for  payment  to  include  name,  contact information, and balances due, so Contractor may independently confirm balances and issue joint checks accordingly.
